channel.title: Naija Digest Online
channel.description: Nigeria’s one-stop hub for breaking news, tech, football, celebrity gossip, Naija music, live TV, exchange rates and trending topics.

item.title: FULL LIST: Oyo honours teachers, civilians, soldiers killed during school kidnap, rescue

item.description:
Oyo State Government honours civilians, teachers, and soldiers who lost their lives during the Oriire school kidnap and rescue operation. Read the full lis

item.title: Lagos urges healthy lifestyle to improve public health
item.dc:creator: Punch
item.description:
Lagos State Government promotes healthy living through sports and partnerships, encouraging residents to adopt active lifestyles and improve public health.
Read More: https://punchng.com/lagos-urges-healthy-lifestyle-to-improve-public-health/

item.title: 85, 90+2! Argentina's late show breaks England hearts to end World Cup dream
item.dc:creator: Sky Sports Football
item.description: England missed out on their first World Cup final since 1966 after a stunning late turnaround from rivals Argentina saw the holders earn a 2-1 victory thanks to Lautaro Martinez’s stoppage-time winner.

item.title: Abducted NECO candidates wrote exams at ‘miracle centre’ – Kogi

item.description:
Two NECO candidates abducted in Kogi were writing exams at a ‘miracle centre.’ The state government is intensifying efforts to rescue the remaining four vi

item.description:

item.title: US launches fresh strikes on Iran as Trump warns Tehran it 'better behave'
item.dc:creator: BBC News World
item.description: US President Donald Trump says he is yet to decide whether or not he will "finish off" Iran.

item.description: The Agriculture and Rural Development Secretariat of the Federal Capital Territory Administration (FCTA) has confirmed an outbreak of rabies with two deaths already recorded. Confirming the virus, the Director of Veterinary Services in the secretariat, Dr Karnak Dandam, disclosed that eight cases we

item.dc:creator: Leadership
item.description: Nigeria has recorded a major breakthrough in international travel security after successfully integrating its passport authentication system into the International Civil Aviation Organisation (ICAO) Public Key Directory (PKD), a development expected to eliminate verification challenges previo

item.title: Argentina celebrate progressing to World Cup final
item.dc:creator: BBC Sport Football
item.description: Defending champions Argentina celebrate at full time, after beating England 2-1 to make it through to their second successive World Cup final.

item.dc:creator: New Telegraph
item.description: …As Public Accounts Committee queries missing audited reports The Senate Committee on Public Accounts, on Wednesday, gave the Ogun-Osun River Basin Development Authority a two-week ultimatum to reconcile its financial records or face legislative sanctions. The directive was issued during an in

item.title: Ukraine defence minister resigns as part of Zelensky's cabinet reshuffle
item.dc:creator: France 24
item.description: Ukraine's Defence Minister Mykhailo Fedorov announced his resignation on Wednesday as part of President Volodymyr Zelensky's cabinet reshuffle, stepping down after overseeing a rapid expansion of drone warfare capabilities and military reforms during Russia's full-scale invasion.

item.title: Police Arrest Suspected Cultist, Recover Revolver In Taraba School
item.dc:creator: Leadership
item.description: The Taraba State Police Command has arrested an 18-year old suspected cultist and recovered an illegal revolver pistol at a Qur’anic school in Jalingo.   The command said the suspect was arrested on Tuesday night following a reported altercation between two students at the Sheikh Abdullah

The state Commissioner for Education, Senator Stephen Odey, made this known during a media chat yesterday. Odey described the speculation as an unfo

item.title: A big dividend cut and a $2 billion charge: Conagra’s results signal more pain ahead for food industry
item.dc:creator: MarketWatch
item.description: Conagra Brands’ stock was up a bit on Thursday, but the company’s results and forecast were the latest dose of bad news for the packaged-food industry.

item.dc:creator: Daily Post
item.description: Former Kaduna State Governor Nasir El-Rufai has withdrawn three applications filed in his ongoing corruption case after his new lawyer apologised to the Kaduna State High Court. item.dc:creator: Completesports
item.description: Lionel Messi inspired World Cup holders Argentina to a stunning comeback to beat England 2-1 on Wednesday and set up a final with European champions Spain, France 24 reports. England had been on course to reach their first World Cup final since 1966 after Anthony Gordon fired them into the lead 10 m

item.description: Lawsuit accuses Terry Harwood of misusing xAI to bypass safeguards and produce explicit deepfakes involving minors.

item.title: Bauchi hit-and-run kills 19-year-old student
item.dc:creator: Daily Post
item.description: A 500-level student of the Federal University of Health Sciences, Azare, Rebecca Kambai, has been killed in a hit-and-run accident along the Bauchi-Jos Road in Bauchi. The 19-year-old died on Tuesday evening after a Sharon commercial bus allegedly rammed into the motorcycle she was riding

item.description: The Naira appreciated on Wednesday against the dollar at the official foreign exchange market for the first time this week. item.title: AI is so big, it’s now impossible for investors to avoid
item.dc:creator: MarketWatch
item.description: Exposure to the artificial-intelligence boom has become virtually impossible for investors to avoid. The theme hasn’t just cornered the stock market. It has systematically swallowed up corporate credit and venture capital, too.

item.title: Late Martinez header sends Argentina to World Cup final
item.dc:creator: BBC Sport Football
item.description: Substitute Lautaro Martinez is in the right place at the right time to head home Lionel Messi's 92nd-minute cross to send Argentina to the World Cup final at the expense of England.

item.title: Messi magic sinks England, sends Argentina into World Cup final
item.dc:creator: PM News
item.description: As the match entered stoppage time, Messi delivered another moment of brilliance. His perfectly weighted cross found substitute Lautaro Martínez, who headed into an empty net in the 92nd minute to complete Argentina's dramatic turnaround and seal a 2-1 victory.

item.title: World Cup: Messi inspires comeback win as Argentina reach final
item.dc:creator: Daily Trust
item.description: Lionel Messi provided two assists to lead Argentina to a come-from-behind 2-1 win over England in their 2026 FIFA World Cup semi-final match at the Atlanta stadium. The 39-year-old was the catalyst as Argentina won a physical contest that saw England defending after going ahead through Anthony Gordo

item.title: Show HN: Firefox in WebAssembly
item.dc:creator: Hacker News
item.description: This is the entire Firefox browser rendering to a element. Gecko, all UI components, and the Spidermonkey JS engine are all compiled and running in WebAssembly.Here are a few things you might find interesting:- This is fully end to end encrypted! We use the WISP protocol for TCP-over-websockets.- T

item.title: Tinubu seeks constitutional pathway for state police
item.dc:creator: Tribune
item.description: Emerging details of the proposed State Police bill transmitted by President Bola Tinubu to the House of Representatives seek to The post Tinubu seeks constitutional pathway for state police appeared first on Tribune Online.

item.title: Lateef Jakande Leadership Academy’s fellows unveil digital hub to bridge tech gap
item.dc:creator: BusinessDay
item.description: The Lateef Jakande Leadership Academy’s fellows has unveiled a state-of-the-art digital hub and revamped library in Alapere Community read more Lateef Jakande Leadership Academy’s fellows unveil digital hub to bridge tech gap

item.title: Senate gives NNPCL auditors one week to explain N210tn unreconciled figures
item.dc:creator: The Sun
item.description: Senate committee gives NNPC auditors one week to explain N210tn in unreconciled receivables and payables in audited accounts. The post Senate gives NNPCL auditors one week to explain N210tn unreconciled figures appeared first on The Sun Nigeria.

item.title: Senate minority leader raises fresh doubts over state police
item.dc:creator: BusinessDay
item.description: … faults govts motives Abba Moro, the Senate Minority Leader, has raised fresh concerns over the proposed creation of state read more Senate minority leader raises fresh doubts over state police

item.title: The Optimistic Case for the Hochul Data Center Pause
item.dc:creator: Bloomberg Markets
item.description: All politicians are being forced to navigate this issue.

item.title: Sheinbaum rejects US claim that Mexico’s government is linked to cartels
item.dc:creator: Al Jazeera
item.description: Sheinbaum has denounced remarks from DEA head Terry Cole as a baseless 'political statement' about Mexico.

item.title: The U.S. oil reserve is at a 40-year low — but the government says there’s still plenty of breathing room
item.dc:creator: MarketWatch
item.description: Energy Department says operational minimum for the storage caverns is about 70 million barrels, a level far lower than oil industry estimates

item.title: NCAA bans pilots in Asaba incident from flying
item.dc:creator: Premium Times
item.description: On 10 June, a Bombardier Challenger 601-3A, a VMO Aero-operated aircraft, landed on a road under construction near Asaba Airport. The post NCAA bans pilots in Asaba incident from flying appeared first on Premium Times Nigeria.

item.title: No evidence Mitch McConnell’s ‘proof of life’ photo is fake or AI-generated
item.dc:creator: France 24
item.description: After weeks of speculation over his health after he hadn’t been seen in weeks, Republican Senator Mitch McConnell shared a "proof of life" photo showing himself alive and well in an apparent bid to silence the rumours. Instead, it fuelled a fresh wave of conspiracy theories.

item.title: “New York, We’re Coming”: Teenage Star Yamal Sends World Cup Final Warning After Spain’s Triumph
item.dc:creator: Leadership
item.description: Spain sensation Lamine Yamal has warned the football world that La Roja are ready to conquer New York after inspiring his country to the FIFA World Cup final. The Barcelona winger played a decisive role as Spain defeated France 2-0 in the semi-final, winning the penalty that allowed Mikel Oyarzabal

item.title: What are the obstacles to peace between Israel and Lebanon?
item.dc:creator: Al Jazeera
item.description: Another round of talks is under way between Israel and Lebanon to try to advance the ceasefire agreement.
